<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Aurora DNS](https://www.pcextreme.com/dns-health-checks) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/auroradns/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "auroradns"
  dnsCredentials:
    # AURORA_API_KEY: API key or username to used
    apiKey: ""
    # AURORA_SECRET: Secret password to be used
    secret: ""
    # AURORA_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL
    endpoint: ""
    # AURORA_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # AURORA_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # AURORA_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
